unchangedJobs.title: Expression of Interest - International School of Ticino
unchangedJobs.description:
## Descrizione

Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 121 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13.

The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.

descriptionByLocale.en: ## Descrizione Inspired Education is the leading global group of premium schools, with a portfolio of 121 premium private schools spanning 6 continents which utilise proven educational practices from every corner of the globe, ensuring over 95,000 students receive a world-class learning experience from Kindergarten to Year 13. The International School of Ticino (IST) is part of the Inspired Education Group, one of the world's leading premium school groups. Located in Lugano, IST offers a stimulating international learning environment in Ticino.
descriptionByLocale.it: ## Descrizione Inspired Education è il principale gruppo globale di scuole premium, con un portafoglio di 121 scuole private premium distribuite su 6 continenti che utilizzano pratiche educative collaudate provenienti da ogni angolo del mondo, garantendo a oltre 95.000 studenti un’esperienza di apprendimento di livello mondiale dalla Scuola dell’Infanzia al 13° anno. La Scuola Internazionale del Ticino (IST) fa parte del Gruppo Inspired Education, uno dei principali gruppi scolastici premium al mondo. Situata a Lugano, IST offre un ambiente di apprendimento internazionale stimolante nel Canton Ticino.
descriptionByLocale.de: ## Beschreibung Inspired Education ist die führende globale Gruppe von Premium-Schulen mit einem Portfolio von 121 Premium-Privatschulen auf 6 Kontinenten, die bewährte Bildungspraktiken aus allen Ecken der Welt nutzen und so sicherstellen, dass über 95.000 Schüler vom Kindergarten bis zur 13. Klasse eine erstklassige Lernerfahrung erhalten. Die International School of Ticino (IST) ist Teil der Inspired Education Group, einer der weltweit führenden Premium-Schulgruppen. In Lugano gelegen bietet IST eine anregende internationale Lernumgebung im Tessin.
descriptionByLocale.fr: ## Description Inspired Education est le premier groupe mondial d’écoles premium, avec un portefeuille de 121 écoles privées premium réparties sur 6 continents qui utilisent des pratiques éducatives éprouvées provenant de tous les coins du monde, garantissant ainsi à plus de 95 000 élèves une expérience d’apprentissage de niveau mondial de la maternelle à la 13e année. L’International School of Ticino (IST) fait partie du Groupe Inspired Education, l’un des principaux groupes scolaires premium mondiaux. Située à Lugano, IST offre un environnement d’apprentissage international stimulant dans le Tessin.
